caveats: Legacy/current schema mismatch on execution_status value (PHASE_1_ACTIVE vs NOT_EVALUATED)
explanation: NOT_EVALUATED means the execution engine has not yet been run against this structural model. PHASE_1_ACTIVE is the legacy pre-Stream-10 equivalent. Both mean: execution assessment is pending. This drives the completion_points gate (0 until evaluated) and the projected vs canonical score split. NOTE: CONCEPT-06 predicate uses PHASE_1_ACTIVE — will not match NOT_EVALUATED on recomputed run (known semantic gap).
